TEXT.source: http://www.dspace.cam.ac.uk/handle/1810/241561. Whitehorn Paiwan collection, record 8 side b of tape: Christian songs to Western tunes. The song titles are: 1) Saviour, Lead Me; 2) Pass Me Not; 3) Lord of Life; 4) Blessed is He Who Follows the Lord; 5) God Be With You. Recorded in March 1969.
